title: Miniature berry cake and garden dessert set for dollhouse in 1:12 scale
description: A bright and detailed miniature garden dessert scene in 1:12 scale — entirely handcrafted. This set features a berry cake, fresh berries, tiny desserts, a bowl of fruit, a decorative plant in a jar, small eggs in a carton, and other delicate picnic-style details. Every berry, cake, bowl, jar, plant, and tiny accessory was sculpted and painted by me with great attention to detail. All items are glued to the base. Perfect for collectors, dollhouse decoration, dioramas, fairy g…
